ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_location" TEXT /* Location of the property */,
  "owners_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner of the property */,
  "owners_mailing_address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the owner */,
  "city_state_zip" TEXT /* City, state, and ZIP code of the property location */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "property_full_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, townhouse) */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., occupied, vacant, under renovation) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Number of units in the property (if applicable) */,
  "property_manager" TEXT /* Name or ID of the property manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owners_name FOREIGN KEY ("owners_name") REFERENCES owners ("owners_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owners_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "owners_mailing_address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the property owner */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the owner */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each associated address */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "associated_address" TEXT /* Associated address related to the property */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., physical, mailing) */,
  "address_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or information about the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for geographical data */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the property location */,
  "geographical_notes" TEXT /* Additional geographical information or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_data_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the property */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, new entry, deletion) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Brief reason or description for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, state) of the user when the action was performed */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Indicates whether the action was successful or failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
